dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7991 IH: Stop Taxing Our Power Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Van Drew introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To prohibit States from imposing charges for the purpose of funding the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative Energy Efficiency Program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Stop Taxing Our Power Act or the STOP RGGI Act.

section.header: Prohibition on State funding of the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative Energy Efficiency Program
section.text: No State may impose a charge for purposes of funding the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative Energy Efficiency Program.
